mnemonics.title: LIME Purpose
mnemonics.content: LIME = Locally Interpretable Model Explanations (Think 'local lemon' for local explanations)

mnemonics.title: SHAP Basis
mnemonics.content: SHAP → Shapley Values → Think 'fair share' from game theory

acronyms.usage: Used to link human concepts to model predictions

visualTips.visualization: Imagine heatmaps over images where 'hot' colors show influential pixels

analogies.analogy: Like using a simple sketch to explain a complex painting
